---
title: "Distance Per Site"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
# goal: Plot data on sediment flux vs. distance from marsh for each transect separately at each site – could run model at that limited level to see if patterns or differences emerge
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r, load packages}

library(patchwork)
library(tidyverse)
library(Rmisc)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(lmerTest)
library(ggeffects)
library(scales)
library(ggh4x)
library(rcartocolor)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/savan/OneDrive - San Francisco State University/ProjectData/GitHub/DepositionSFB/data')
```

```{r}

# Ensure Month/Phase is ordered correctly
sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>%
  mutate(Study.Phase = factor(Study.Phase, levels = c("M1","M2","M3","M4","M5","M6")))


ggplot(sed_thesis, aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(Dist)), y = Flux, color = Study.Phase, group = interaction(Study.Phase, Tran))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    trans = scales::trans_new(
    "log1p",
    transform = function(x) log(x + 1),
    inverse = function(x) exp(x) - 1),                     # log(Dist + 1) — matches your model exactly
    breaks = c(0.5, 2, 6, 12, 18, 24, 48),             # your actual distance points
    labels = c("0.5", "2", "6", "12", "18", "24", "48")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Study phase",
    values = c(
      "M1" = "#4E79A7",
      "M2" = "#F28E2B",
      "M3" = "#59A14F",
      "M4" = "#E15759",
      "M5" = "#B07AA1",
      "M6" = "#76B7B2"
    )
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance from source (m)",
    y = "Flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment flux decay by site and study phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>%
  mutate(Study.Phase = factor(Study.Phase, levels = c("M1","M2","M3","M4","M5","M6")),
         Dist = factor(Dist, levels = c(0.5, 2, 6, 12, 18, 24, 48)))  # distance as factor for boxplot grouping


# --- OPTION 1: All phases overlaid, faceted by site ---
# Good if you want to compare phases within each site
# May get busy with 6 phases × 7 distances × 2 transects

ggplot(sed_thesis, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, fill = Study.Phase)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    outlier.size = 1.5,
    outlier.alpha = 0.6,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.85)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Study phase",
    values = c(
      "M1" = "#4E79A7",
      "M2" = "#F28E2B",
      "M3" = "#59A14F",
      "M4" = "#E15759",
      "M5" = "#B07AA1",
      "M6" = "#76B7B2"
    )
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Distance from source (m)",
    y = "Flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment flux by site and study phase"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


# --- OPTION 2: Faceted by site AND phase ---
# Cleaner if option 1 is too crowded
# Each panel = one site × one phase combination


# Update summary to include standard error
sed_summary <- sed_thesis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site, Dist, Tran, Study.Phase) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_flux = sum(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Reorder sites
sed_summary$Site <- factor(sed_summary$Site, levels = c("GiantMarsh", "SanPablo", "Buck'sLanding", "CorteMadera"))

# Plot
ggplot(sed_summary, aes(x = factor(Dist), y = total_flux, fill = Study.Phase)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single")) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_flux - se_flux, ymax = mean_flux + se_flux),
    position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"),
    width = 0.25,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "PurpOr", name = "Study Phase") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  facet_grid(Site ~ .) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance Along Transect (m)",
    y = "Total flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Four Marshes for 6 Monthly Collections (July-November)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 80),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 88),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

ggsave("sed_dist_study.phase_full.png", 
       width = 60, 
       height = 40, 
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Plot
ggplot(sed_summary[sed_summary$Site == "GiantMarsh",], aes(x = factor(Dist), y = total_flux, fill = Study.Phase)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single")) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_flux - se_flux, ymax = mean_flux + se_flux),
    position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"),
    width = 0.25,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "PurpOr", name = "Study Phase") +
   facet_grid(Tran ~ .) + 
  labs(
    x = "Distance Along Transect (m)",
    y = "Total flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Giant Marsh for 6 Monthly Collections (July-November)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 80),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 88),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

ggsave("sed_dist_study.phase_G.png", 
       width = 60, 
       height = 40, 
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}
ggplot(sed_summary[sed_summary$Site == "SanPablo",], aes(x = factor(Dist), y = total_flux, fill = Study.Phase)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single")) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_flux - se_flux, ymax = mean_flux + se_flux),
    position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"),
    width = 0.25,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "PurpOr", name = "Study Phase") +
  facet_grid(Tran ~ .) + 
  labs(
    x = "Distance Along Transect (m)",
    y = "Total flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at San Pablo NWR for 6 Monthly Collections (July-November)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 80),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 88),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

ggsave("sed_dist_study.phase_S.png", 
       width = 60, 
       height = 40, 
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)

```

```{r}

ggplot(sed_summary[sed_summary$Site == "Buck'sLanding",], aes(x = factor(Dist), y = total_flux, fill = Study.Phase)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single")) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_flux - se_flux, ymax = mean_flux + se_flux),
    position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"),
    width = 0.25,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "PurpOr", name = "Study Phase") + 
  facet_grid(Tran ~ .) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance Along Transect (m)",
    y = "Total Flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Buck's Landing for 6 Monthly Collections (July-November)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 80),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 88),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

ggsave("sed_dist_study.phase_B.png", 
       width = 60, 
       height = 40, 
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}
ggplot(sed_summary[sed_summary$Site == "CorteMadera",], aes(x = factor(Dist), y = total_flux, fill = Study.Phase)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single")) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_flux - se_flux, ymax = mean_flux + se_flux),
    position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"),
    width = 0.25,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "PurpOr", name = "Study Phase") +
  facet_grid(Tran ~ .) + 
  labs(
    x = "Distance Along Transect (m)",
    y = "Total flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Corte Madera Marsh for 6 Monthly Collections (July-November)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 80),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 88),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

ggsave("sed_dist_study.phase_C.png", 
       width = 60, 
       height = 40, 
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r, sediment at each replicate over time}

ggplot(sed_summary[sed_summary$Site == "CorteMadera",], aes(x = Dist, y = total_flux, fill = Study.Phase)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single")) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_flux - se_flux, ymax = mean_flux + se_flux),
    position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"),
    width = 0.25,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "PurpOr", name = "Study Phase") +
  facet_grid(Tran ~ .) + 
  labs(
    x = "Distance Along Transect (m)",
    y = "Total flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment Flux At Each Distance From Marsh Edge at Corte Madera Marsh Across Monthly Collections (July-November)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 80),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 88),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

ggsave("sed_dist_study.phase_dist_C.png", 
       width = 60, 
       height = 40, 
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)

```
